_comment_diagnostics: Body/skin names + tuning the headless --collision-watch / --settle-probe / --pull-test probes operate on, so run_scene.py holds no task-specific names. graspable_body = the moving body whose true pose is tracked; obstacle_body = the static frame it must clear; ring_skin = the captive-ring render skin used for the hole-frame PCA. settle_probe.wire_z_min / base_z_max split the obstacle's world points into the upper rod (ring rides it) and lower base box (penetration check).
